name: remargin-marketplace
description: Marketplace for the remargin Claude Code plugin

plugins.name: remargin
plugins.description: Process sandboxed and individual managed markdown files in a remargin vault, and surface what changed since the caller last touched the workspace. Provides /remargin:process-file, /remargin:consolidate, /remargin:process-sandbox-group, /remargin:process-sandbox, and /remargin:activity slash commands plus a natural-language skill layer.
